commit.message:
8384830: Handle HATThreadOp kernel context accesses in PTXHATKernelBuilder

Route HATThreadOp through a local helper and add PTX lowering for
gix/giy/gsx/gsy. Cache the required X/Y thread registers and kernel
context address so the PTX path can materialize 2D global indices and
sizes used by kernel context accesses.

This restores PTX handling for 2D kernel context usage such as
TestMatMul matrixMultiply2D.
